name: star-mansions
description: 二十八星宿测算 Web App — 单仓 monorepo（frontend + backend workspaces）

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm -w backend run dev" "npm -w frontend run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm -w backend run typecheck && npm -w frontend run typecheck
scripts.build: npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend run build
